commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an LLM-core readability preflight in `validateToolArguments()` plus regression tests for unreadable root and nested tool schemas while preserving plain JSON-schema numeric coercion.

PR surface: Source +66, Tests +56. Total +122 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main sends `tool.parameters` straight into TypeBox conversion/compilation, and the PR body reports a direct proxy-schema repro with a stable after-fix error.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to move the protected draft forward and choose the canonical branch for the overlapping unreadable-schema fix; there is no narrow automated repair finding.

target.title: fix(llm): guard unreadable tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary
- Add an LLM-core tool schema readability preflight before TypeBox conversion/compilation.
- Report unreadable root or nested tool schema structures as unsupported tool-schema errors instead of leaking raw proxy/TypeBox traversal failures.
- Cover unreadable nested `properties` maps and unreadable root schemas while preserving normal numeric coercion behavior.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check packages/llm-core/src/validation.ts packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/llm-core/src/validation.ts packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` (`run_50dfc7fb87ed`, lease `cbx_7d4d2b20591a`, provider `aws`, exit 0)

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: `validateToolArguments()` could leak raw TypeBox/proxy errors when a plugin/tool supplied an unreadable schema object, e.g. a `properties` map whose `ownKeys()` throws.
Real environment tested: local focused LLM-core validation test lane in a Codex worktree with symlinked dependencies; remote AWS Crabbox changed gate (`run_50dfc7fb87ed`, lease `cbx_7d4d2b20591a`, provider `aws`).
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` plus formatting, oxlint, diff-check, autoreview, and remote `pnpm check:changed` commands listed above.
Evidence after fix: focused LLM-core validation suite passed with 4 tests; direct repro now reports `Unsupported tool schema for "hostile-tool": unreadable schema at parameters.properties`; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings; remote `pnpm check:changed` passed lanes `core` and `coreTests` on AWS Crabbox.
Observed result after fix: unreadable tool schemas fail before TypeBox traversal with a stable unsupported-schema message; readable plain JSON schema coercion still passes.
What was not tested: no live agent/tool execution session; this change is covered at LLM-core unit level plus changed-gate type/lint/guard proof.
target.author: vincentkoc
